summary: Comprehensive backend testing (33 pytest cases) + targeted frontend smoke tests across Main Web, Owner PWA and Bar PWA. Backend 33/33 PASS after one test-assertion fix. Frontend critical flows (admin login -> dashboard with separated hotel/bar panels, sidebar nav, New Reservation dialog, Admin PIN gate unlock, Owner read-only PWA with 0 edit controls) all work. Bar PWA login + shell works but inventory rows did not render in one trial after a fresh login (likely localStorage draft / load-state issue) -- prefill API returns 4 items correctly.

minor.issue: When extending, MongoDB update mixes $set and $inc on overlapping field paths is fine here (different fields). No bug, just noting that nights field tracked via $inc and check_out via $set works correctly in test.

ui_bugs.issue: Inventory section showed 'No active items configured.' on first load after fresh login; backend /api/bar/entries/prefill returned 4 items at the same moment. Likely a load-race or stale localStorage 'bardraft' (single key shared across dates) overriding fresh prefill.
Uses browser-native date inputs (mm/dd/yyyy) instead of shadcn Calendar/DatePicker component. Spec/playbook calls for shadcn calendar.
Login testids are bar-login-email/password/submit but review request documented them as bar-app-email/password/submit. Mismatch with spec docs (functional but breaks documented test contract).

integration_issues.issue: Items not populating from prefill on initial render in one test run; backend confirmed returning items.

issues: Multiple Radix Dialog warnings: 'Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent'. Add DialogDescription or aria-describedby to silence and improve a11y.

action_items: Investigate BarApp initial load: ensure prefill items render after login on first navigation (consider per-date draftKey instead of single 'bardraft' key, and don't preserve empty drafts).
Reconcile bar PWA login testids (bar-login-* vs spec's bar-app-*).
Replace native date inputs in ReservationDialog with shadcn Calendar/DatePicker as per playbook.
Add DialogDescription/aria-describedby to all shadcn Dialog usages.
critical_code_review_comments: Owner role read-only enforcement is correctly implemented in require_write (returns 403 for owner across hotel/bar/payouts/log endpoints).
Negative bar cash_sales accepted and flowed through reconciliation; over_short computed correctly (verified: -45.50 cash sales -> expected_cash 144.5, over_short -4.5).
Tax computed at 9% verified at hotel reservation create + extend.
Bar entry submission upserts on date (unique index on bar_entries.date); good.
useBarEntry uses single draftKey='bardraft' shared across dates - drafts from one date can overwrite another. Recommend `bardraft:${date}`.
JWT scope='read' on owner is duplicate of role check; defence-in-depth ok but currently only role is enforced.
WebSocket /api/ws sometimes closes before connection per browser warnings - investigate ingress timing or initial connect race.
test_credentials: admin@super8.com / admin123 (PIN 1234); owner@super8.com / owner123 - both confirmed working
seed_data_creation: Test created TEST_ prefixed rooms (TESTAxxxx, CONVxxxx), reservations (TEST_Guest1, TEST_Future), bar item (TEST_Item_xxxx), and bar entries for 2026-06-28 and 2026-01-01. Not auto-cleaned; can be removed manually if desired.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend regression suite at /app/backend/tests/test_super8_backend.py covers auth, owner read-only enforcement, hotel CRUD + availability blocking + early checkout refund + extend, bar items + entries (incl. negative cash + below_par + late_entry), admin PIN gate + users CRUD + audit logs + log edit PIN gate, AI history + SSE chat, reports + dashboard structure. Run with: pytest /app/backend/tests/test_super8_backend.py -v. Backend dashboard is structured as hotel.{revenue.{cash,card,interac,total}, total_rooms, occupied, vacant, occupancy_pct, checkins_today, checkouts_today, ghost_rooms} and bar.{revenue.{cash,card,total}, entry_today, last_entry_date, last_over_short, below_par_count}. Hotel vs bar revenue kept separate. Frontend Bar PWA needs revisit for items not rendering on initial load.
rca of the issue: Bar PWA 'No active items configured': hook useBarEntry uses draftKey='bardraft' (single key) so a stale empty draft from any prior date can replace fresh prefill rows. Reproduce: open /bar-app twice on different dates without clearing localStorage. Mitigation: scope draftKey per-date e.g. `bardraft:${date}` and skip applying draft if its rows array is empty while prefill returned items.
